examples: Vacuolar compartmentalization appears to be the source of tolerance of metal_accumulating plants.
Workspaces can also be linked together in Networks, allowing easier compartmentalization and coordination on a per-project basis.
This compartmentalization makes it easy to update these third-party tools, which don't necessarily require changes to Eclipse itself.
Lane argues this compartmentalization invites leaders to think in terms of trade-offs, not integration.
The big picture is what you need to keep in mind, not the compartmentalization.
